info.title: Helen Admin API
info.description: Helen / CommClient-Server admin control plane API

get.description:
Return host + service metrics + recent alerts.
Shape:
    {
      ts, cpu, mem, net_in_mbps, net_out_mbps, disk_io_mbps,
      rps, errors, rtt_ms,
      alerts: [{severity, message, timestamp}, ...]
    }

schema.title: Response Get Observability Metrics Api Admin Observability Metrics Get

get.description: Per-transport probe snapshot. Cached for 2s to throttle storms.

schema.title: Response Get Transport Status Api Admin Transports  Name  Status Get

get.description: Paginated active connections; ordered by newest first.

schema.title: Response List Connections Api Admin Connections List Get

post.description: Forcefully terminate a live connection. Logged to the audit chain.

schema.title: Response Kick Connection Api Admin Connections  Conn Id  Kick Post
Response Disconnect Client Api Admin Clients  Client Id  Disconnect Post

get.description: Return the aggregated `{nodes, edges, flags}` snapshot.

schema.title: Response Get Topology Graph Api Admin Topology Graph Get
Response List Topology Nodes Api Admin Topology Nodes Get
Response List Topology Links Api Admin Topology Links Get

get.description: Shortest path with hop-by-hop latency + transport.

schema.title: Response Topology Path Api Admin Topology Path Get

post.description:
Kick off a topology action (ping, traceroute, drain, restart, failover).

Returns the ``job_id`` plus the current job status — the long-running
work is performed in the background.

get.description: Status / result of a previously started topology action.

get.description: Reconstruct the chain of custody from audit + job + drill rows.

get.description: Full federation mesh graph: nodes = peers, edges = trust links.

get.description: All currently live calls with a one-line MOS summary.

Search past calls via the existing ``call_logs`` table.
``quality`` accepts excellent/good/fair/poor/bad and filters by
metadata_json's stored MOS label (best-effort).

Return the resolved (URL + token-set flag) the proxy is using.

Note: never echoes back the actual token bytes — only the
``token_set`` boolean and length.

schema.title: Response Get Connection Config Admin Router Control Connection Get

put.description: Override the router URL + token at runtime (DB-backed).

schema.title: Response Set Connection Config Admin Router Control Connection Put

get.description:
Quick yes/no — is Helen-Router responding? Powers the green
light in the admin dashboard. Never proxies — checks locally.

schema.title: Response Reachability Probe Admin Router Reachability Get

get.description:
Helen-Router exposes neighbours through /mesh/topology, but a
dedicated endpoint is convenient for paginated views. We forward
to /mesh/topology and let the router return the slice — the
upstream implementation is free to add a dedicated route later.

post.description:
Force a mesh recomputation. Body may include
``{"server_id": "...", "via": "router-id"}``.

get.description:
Live access log. Streamed because the router may produce
a very large response on a busy LAN.

delete.description: Delete by query params (?name=&type=) or body.

post.description:
Token rotation is high-value — emits a critical-severity audit
entry on both the attempt and outcome.

delete.description: Body or query (?rule_id=...) selects which rule to remove.

token.title: Token
token.description: If null, keep existing token; if empty string, clear it; otherwise set the new token.
